title: Delhi Heat Wave
lead: Delhi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.11. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Delhi has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 49%, and the wind speed is approximately 10.2 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The lack of rainfall and high temperatures have resulted in a critical situation, with a significant impact on daily life and operations.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
